name: Blueberry-Cheese Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together 1 1/4 cups sugar and 1/2 cup of the butter.
2. Add eggs to the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, combine 2 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture, alternating with milk; mix well after each addition.
5. Beat in the cream cheese, mixing well.
6. Stir in 1 teaspoon lemon peel.
7. Toss blueberries (frozen or fresh) with 2 tablespoons flour and gently fold into the batter.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 9-by-13-by-2-inch pan.
9. Sprinkle the remaining sugar, butter, flour, and lemon peel over the batter.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes.
